title: Eclipse Pixelmon Pack
description: This is a datapack for Pixelmon thats adds custom pokemon that i made
body:
This is a datapack i made for me and my friends originally, but as i started to add more stuff i thought i should release it to the public.

This is a datapack for pixelmon, i know it works for 1.16.5 but i havent tested it on 1.20.

You can look at the photos to see each pokemons information, or join the discord

Currently in game there are no descriptions for custom moves, or pokedex entrys for the custom pokemon.

Also make sure you put the datapack file inside of the datapack folder of your game or in the server if being used in a server, and also make sure to put resource pack file in your resoruce pack folder

### **You can use this on a server just give credit to me please.
###  
### You can use this to make content just please reach out to me on discord before hand and give me credit**
###  
### **All Models are property of Pixelmon
###  
### Textures are made by me**
